vision: VentureBoard is a mobile-first SaaS platform designed for startup executives to manage financial forecasting, user analytics, and team productivity. It features a sleek, dark-mode interface with a primary blue accent (#136dec), utilizing Tailwind CSS for a modern, responsive design with iOS-style safe areas and rounded corners.

screens.title: Landing Page
screens.description: The entry point for new users, featuring a hero section with the VentureBoard logo, the tagline 'Scale with Certainty', and an abstract data visualization placeholder.
screens.prompt: Design a high-conversion landing page for VentureBoard. The hero section should feature a glowing blue primary color theme. Include a prominent 'Sign In' button and a 'Create Account' link. The background should have a subtle ambient glow effect. Use the Inter font and Material Icons.

screens.title: Sign In
screens.description: A secure login form allowing users to access their dashboard using their work email.
screens.prompt: Create a clean, mobile-optimized sign-in screen. Include a large 'Work Email' input field with a floating label or placeholder. Below the form, provide a 'Forgot Password' link. Use the dark mode color palette with the primary blue accent.

screens.title: Create Account
screens.description: A registration form for new users to join the VentureBoard network.
screens.prompt: Design a registration form with fields for Full Name, Work Email, and Password. Ensure the input fields have rounded corners and focus states. Include a 'Create Account' button at the bottom. Maintain the dark theme and Inter typography.

screens.title: Forgot Password
screens.description: A recovery flow allowing users to reset their access via email.
screens.prompt: Design a password reset screen with a 'lock_reset' icon. Include an input for the email address and a 'Send Reset Link' button. Add a back navigation arrow to return to the sign-in page.

screens.title: Executive Dashboard
screens.description: The main hub for high-level metrics, notifications, and quick settings.
screens.prompt: Create a dashboard view with a header showing 'Executive Dashboard' and a sub-header 'VentureBoard Engine'. Include notification and settings icons. The layout should be clean, utilizing cards for key metrics.

screens.title: User Analytics
screens.description: Detailed view of user engagement, featuring search functionality and regional data cards.
screens.prompt: Design an analytics screen with a search bar at the top. Include a grid of 'region cards' displaying user data. Use the dark surface colors and border styles defined in the CSS.

screens.title: Financial Forecasting
screens.description: A modeling tool for Series A projections, featuring Base Case and Bull Case toggles.
screens.prompt: Create a financial forecasting interface. Include a header with tabs for 'Base Case' and 'Bull Case'. The active tab should be highlighted in blue. Include a chart placeholder or data table below the tabs.

screens.title: Team Productivity
screens.description: A view to monitor team performance and individual contributions.
screens.prompt: Design a team productivity screen with a sticky header. Include a list of team members or tasks. Add a notification bell and a profile avatar. Use the dark mode aesthetic.

screens.title: Onboarding: Connect Data
screens.description: Step 1 of the onboarding flow, guiding users to connect their data sources.
screens.prompt: Design an onboarding step screen. Display a large icon representing data connection. Show 'Step 1 of 4' and a 'Skip' button. Use a centered layout with a blue glow effect.

screens.title: Onboarding: Set Goals
screens.description: Step 2 of the onboarding flow, allowing users to define performance targets.
screens.prompt: Design an onboarding step screen. Display a large icon representing goal setting. Show 'Step 2 of 4' and a 'Skip' button. Use a centered layout with a blue glow effect.

screens.title: Onboarding: Invite Team
screens.description: Step 3 of the onboarding flow, facilitating team member invitations.
screens.prompt: Design an onboarding step screen. Display a large icon representing team collaboration. Show 'Step 3 of 4' and a 'Skip' button. Use a centered layout with a blue glow effect.

screens.title: Onboarding: Finalize Setup
screens.description: Step 4 of the onboarding flow, completing the setup process.
screens.prompt: Design the final onboarding step. Display a large icon representing completion. Show 'Step 4 of 4' with a progress bar. Include a 'Get Started' button to enter the dashboard.
